title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: YouTube video demonstrating how to build a role-based access control application using Softr's AI Co-Builder. The tutorial shows creating an event management system with roles, permissions, workflows, and automations without iterative prompting, comparing Softr against competitors like Lovable and Replit.
